items.name_en: Small Size 18cm "High-end Quality Customization" 🚩🚩🚩 Exclusive Custom Release, Upgraded New OHANEL 24K Autumn/Winter New Makeup Bag 🆕 The makeup bag is a popular style favored by Chanel. Elegant and noble, it can serve as a vintage makeup box for various collections. The body features a double C logo, full of vintage retro style, and the capacity is huge. The shape is structured and suitable for various occasions. It can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody! It also features an automatic lock, all-steel 14k pale gold buckle, and imported sheepskin~ soft to the touch and worth buying, looking noble everywhere! Official website sync: 12.5 X 18 X 6.5 cm

Small size 19cm ✓ In stock ✓ ✓ Cherry 🍒 👸Chanel Gold Bead Flap Bag Milky White Fairy Bag! Small and large sizes ✓ [Fireworks][Fireworks][Fireworks]
Really can't put down this white gold-beaded flap bag~ It's also so easy to carry~ I really can't get enough of this gentle temperament style~ Simple styling makes it look so classy~ The double gold beads can serve as a small accent and adjust the chain~ It's great for girls~ Simple to wear and adds soul to your outfit wow

items.name_en: Small Size《Khaki🍠》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 26C Latest Woven Flap Bag, Handwoven Bag, Handwoven Bag Shopping Bag 🥂 The raffia and rattan weaving elements are indispensable in a vacation vibe. Made with imported natural wheat straw, it's surprising to see so many bright-colored suede handbags in the summer vacation series... Perfect for a wonderful summer night dinner or party, the bag is sure to be adorned with jewelry. The favorite is of course the collector series ice cream cup~Size: 23cm

items.name_en: Small size🎖️🎖️🎖️Hobo Bag👛Chanel 24P Hobo Love it love it/❤️Small size Calfskin, satisfied with the shoulder strap length, and it's light. The capacity is a real surprise. It looks small but actually holds a lot[Hook]. The capacity is more than double that of the heart-shaped clasp chubby bag[Wow]. The hobo leather is shiny, and the lining is black fabric. Dimensions: 15.5 x 20.5 x 6.5cm Style AS 4320

items.name_en: The Oversized Panda🐼 Chanel Classic Flap is stunning. The eye-catching LOGO on the body makes it instantly recognizable as Chanel. ✅ Shoulder ✅ Handheld. It holds everything. The Classic Flap is versatile, understated, timeless, lightweight, and spacious. Perfect for daily commuting. I've tested it for you! A casual Classic Flap tote is practical as a mom bag or for school. Double C LOGO is classic and durable. Very spacious with an effortless, lazy vibe! 🧺 Handbag, pink lining is sweet yet cool. Top-tier value in Chanel vintage. Super spacious and lightweight~
